reason: AI semiconductor candidates need OP/EPS/FCF conversion, not keyword exposure.
Customer name, contract amount, shipment schedule, repeat orders, and diversification drive Stage 2/3.
HBM bonder, AI server PCB, test socket, and foundry capacity bottlenecks matter only when revenue conversion is visible.
Stage 2 must be tested against 60D/120D MFE before a late 4B crowding call.
Media reports, MOU, private-company linkage, and missing customer details cap Stage 3.
Capex, dilution, customer concentration, and FCF drag can cool equipment and component stories.
Large semiconductor reratings must be cooled when price outruns revisions or narratives crowd.
